title: nicotiana cirrhoides
intro: Nicotiana cirrhoides, also known as Bear's Breast or Mexican Tobacco, is a flowering plant that belongs to the nightshade family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Nicotiana cirrhoides can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support lung health and alleviate symptoms associated with bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions.
